scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/engine
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/web & npm run dev --workspace=apps/api & wait
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspaces --if-present && npm run type-check:refs
scripts.check-all: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run build
